meaning: adj.盆栽的,瓶或罐装的,浓缩的
examples: He potted the black to take a 7–3 lead.
We decided to divide potted things in the house.
He had a tube with electrodes potted in it filled with atomic hydrogen. And by applying a voltage, he was able to get the gas to glow.
Mr. Abe didn't visit but sent an offering of a potted tree used in rituals.
If she's entertaining outside, Ms. Arntsen likes to stick incense into a potted planter.
